title: ConversationRelay widget now available in Studio
raw_changelog: Studio now includes a ConversationRelay widget for connecting live voice calls to WebSocket servers.
before_text:
## Studio Widgets

### Available Widgets
- Say/Play
- Gather Input
- Send Message
- HTTP Request
- Split Based On
- Connect Call
- Enqueue Call
- Set Variables
after_text:
## Studio Widgets

### Available Widgets
- Say/Play
- Gather Input
- Send Message
- HTTP Request
- Split Based On
- Connect Call
- Enqueue Call
- Set Variables
- ConversationRelay (NEW)
  - Connects voice calls to WebSocket servers
  - Supports custom parameters and voice controls
  - Provides Success and Failed transitions
diff_text:
--- before
+++ after
@@ -9,3 +9,7 @@
 - Enqueue Call
 - Set Variables
+- ConversationRelay (NEW)
+  - Connects voice calls to WebSocket servers
+  - Supports custom parameters and voice controls
+  - Provides Success and Failed transitions

ground_truth.action_required: No action required. New widget available for connecting voice calls to WebSocket servers.
